holdings.infoBox: RSSL is an equity ETF with a total of 1903 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 1.73%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.21%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.75%, Fabrinet at 0.66%, and TTM Technologies at 0.61%.

overview.description: The Global X Russell 2000 ETF (RSSL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 RIC Capped index. The fund tracks an index comprised of small-cap U.S. equities with quarterly capping, ensuring compliance with RIC concentration requirements RSSL was launched on Jun 4, 2024 and is issued by Global X.
